name: Remote Transmitter → Transmit Symphony
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#config-action) sends a Symphony infrared remote code to a remote transmitter. It transmits constant bit-time frames with a footer gap. Physical Symphony remotes typically send the same frame twice separated by a ~35 ms gap. Use `command_repeats` to control how many identical frames are sent; defaults to 2.

config_entries.label: Data
config_entries.description: The Symphony code to send, see dumper output for more info.

config_entries.label: Nbits
config_entries.description: The number of bits to send. Typical values: `8`, `12`, or `16`.

config_entries.label: Command Repeats
config_entries.description: Number of times to send the same frame in one transmission. Defaults to `2` to match typical handsets.
